nasb.text: behold, I will consume Baasha and his house, and I will make your house like the house of Jeroboam the son of Nebat.

esv.text: behold, I will utterly sweep away Baasha and his house, and I will make your house like the house of Jeroboam the son of Nebat.

cnv.text: 看哪，我要除滅巴沙和他的家；我要使你的家像尼八的兒子耶羅波安的家一樣。

ccb.text: 所以我必除掉你和你全家，像除掉尼八的儿子耶罗波安家一样。
